title: Translate gated explainer (hand off to ewing-info-translations)
context: Downstream of the GATED explainer (eoh-edu-403): only AFTER that explainer is expert-signed may its translation proceed, handed off to ewing-info-translations. High risk-tier; same 'not medical advice' and expert-review constraints carry through; translation must preserve the sourced, caveat-laden framing and never relicense copyrighted source. Strictly aggregate, de-identified, open-access data only; no patient-level data; not medical advice.
objective: Only after eoh-edu-403 is expert-signed: hand off the explainer for translation to ewing-info-translations, preserving sourcing, 'not medical advice', and caveats, with appropriate expert/linguistic review.
acceptanceCriteria: Does not start until eoh-edu-403 is signed by the oncologist + patient-advocate reviewer pair.
Translation preserves every sourced claim, the 'not medical advice' notice, and all caveats; no individualized prognosis introduced.
Translation reviewed for linguistic and clinical fidelity before publication; source license honored (no relicensing of copyrighted source).
output: Translation handoff package for ewing-info-translations (publishable only after review).
